description: A discreet roll of lockpicks, fine files, skeleton keys, disguise paints, and a forger's pen — everything a rogue needs for delicate, deniable work. Used with the Thieving skill to pick locks, disarm traps, forge documents, brew poisons, and go unseen.
name: Thieves' Kit
notes: Used with the Thieving skill for lockpicking, traps, forgery, poisons, and disguise
